overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a dark, foggy industrial building. The character navigates narrow walkways, staircases, and corridors illuminated only by a flashlight and sparse overhead bulbs, creating a tense atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial walkway with brick walls

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along a narrow elevated walkway, flashlight illuminating the brick wall and metal railing

entered.detail: rusted metal safety railing running along the left side of the walkway
dark red brick wall with weathered texture running along the right side
single exposed bulb hanging from ceiling providing dim illumination
metal grid flooring of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow, dimly lit industrial walkway with a brick wall on the right and metal railing on the left. The path is illuminated by a flashlight and a distant hanging bulb, revealing metal grate flooring and the enclosed, oppressive atmosphere of the industrial structure.

events.description: approaching window with bars, light level increases slightly
character enters wooden doorway leading to stairwell

agents.ego_description: approaching a barred window then entering a wooden door into a darker interior space

entered.detail: large industrial window with metal bars showing dark exterior
dark wooden door with metal frame leading to interior

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a barred window set in the brick wall, then turns toward and enters a wooden doorway. The lighting shifts as the character moves from the covered walkway into a darker interior corridor, transitioning from outdoor sheltered space to indoor environment.

events.description: character reaches top landing of stairwell

agents.ego_description: climbing a steep metal staircase in a dark shaft, flashlight illuminating the steps ahead

entered.detail: steep industrial metal stairs with open risers ascending into darkness
small metal platform at the top of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep metal staircase in a narrow, dark shaft. The flashlight reveals industrial metal steps and railings as the character climbs upward, reaching a small landing at the top of the stairwell.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metal walkway with cage structures

events.description: character spots a distant figure standing near a light source

agents.ego_description: walking across an elevated metal walkway and spotting a mysterious figure standing in the distance

notable_agents.action: stationary figure standing near a hanging light, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: elevated metal catwalk with railings extending into the darkness
metal cage or elevator shaft structure with vertical bars

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an elevated metal walkway and walks across the open structure. In the distance, a mysterious figure stands motionless near a hanging light. The environment features industrial cage structures and metal railings as the character approaches the figure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial complex that transitions from narrow walkways into a dark interior and finally toward a mysterious encounter. It begins with the character navigating a dimly lit walkway between a brick wall and a metal railing, guided by a flashlight and a distant hanging bulb. As the character passes a barred window, the scene shifts from the sheltered outdoor path into the oppressive darkness of an interior corridor through a wooden doorway. The camera then follows the character as they ascend a steep metal staircase within a narrow shaft, climbing upward until they reach a small landing. Finally, the environment opens onto an elevated metal walkway where the character advances across an open structure toward a motionless figure standing beneath a hanging light.
